evals.name: two-fixture-components
evals.description: ToolCallCard + AgentStatus fixtures in place — tests recall across two violated components simultaneously
evals.expected_output:
## A11y Audit Report — [date]

### Violations

| Component | File | Line | Rule | WCAG SC | Severity |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| ToolCallCard | packages/agents/src/ToolCallCard.tsx | [line] | Expand trigger is Box/HStack with onClick, not <button> | SC 4.1.2 | High |
| AgentStatus | packages/agents/src/AgentStatus.tsx | [line] | Container missing role="status" | SC 4.1.3 | High |
| AgentStatus | packages/agents/src/AgentStatus.tsx | [line] | Container missing aria-live="polite" | SC 4.1.3 | High |
| AgentStatus | packages/agents/src/AgentStatus.tsx | [line] | Color-only state indicator — no visually-hidden text | SC 1.4.1 | High |

### Passing

| Component | Notes |
|---|---|
| Button | aria-busy, aria-label swap, focusVisible ring all present |

### Summary

4 violations across 2 components. 4 are High severity.
assertions: Report identifies ToolCallCard expand/collapse non-button trigger as SC 4.1.2 violation
Report identifies AgentStatus missing role=status as SC 4.1.3 violation
Report identifies AgentStatus missing aria-live=polite as SC 4.1.3 violation
Report identifies AgentStatus color-only status indicator as SC 1.4.1 violation
All violations include file path and line number
Report includes a Passing section listing clean components
Report includes a Summary with violation and severity counts
No source files are modified — report only
Report does NOT flag color.agent.status.* token names as hex violations
Report does NOT flag per-component animation as a violation if AgenticProvider theme-level override exists

evals.name: single-fixture-component

Report includes Button in the Passing section
Violations table includes columns for Component, File, Line, Rule, WCAG SC, and Severity

evals.name: real-codebase
evals.description: No fixtures — audits committed source files and verifies precision (no false positives on token names)
evals.expected_output:
## A11y Audit Report — [date]

### Violations

| Component | File | Line | Rule | WCAG SC | Severity |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| ToolCallCard | packages/agents/src/ToolCallCard.tsx | [line] | Expand trigger is div/HStack with onClick, not <button> | SC 4.1.2 | High |
| AgentStatus | packages/agents/src/AgentStatus.tsx | [line] | Container missing role="status" and aria-live="polite" | SC 4.1.3 | High |
| AgentStatus | packages/agents/src/AgentStatus.tsx | [line] | Color-only state indicator — no visually-hidden text | SC 1.4.1 | High |

### Passing

| Component | Notes |
|---|---|
| Button | aria-busy, aria-label swap, focusVisible ring all present |

### Summary

3 violations across 2 components. 3 are High severity.
assertions: Report identifies ToolCallCard non-button expand trigger as SC 4.1.2 violation
Report identifies AgentStatus missing role=status and aria-live=polite as SC 4.1.3 violations
Report identifies AgentStatus missing visually-hidden text as SC 1.4.1 violation
Report does NOT flag color.agent.status.* or color.on.accent token names as hex violations
Report includes Button in the Passing section
No source files are modified — report only

evals.name: all-clean
evals.description: All components patched to be violation-free — tests that the skill produces no false positives on a clean codebase and correctly reports every component as passing
evals.prompt: Check all the components for WCAG issues and give me a report
evals.expected_output:
## A11y Audit Report — [date]

### Violations

None.

### Passing

| Component | Notes |
|---|---|
| Button | aria-busy, aria-label swap, focusVisible ring all present |
| AgentStatus | role="status", aria-live="polite", visually-hidden text present |
| ToolCallCard | expand trigger is <button> with aria-expanded and aria-controls |

### Summary

0 violations across 0 components.
assertions: Report contains no violation rows
Report lists all audited components in the Passing section
Report includes a Summary stating 0 violations
No source files are modified — report only
Report does NOT flag color.agent.status.* token names as hex violations
Report does NOT flag VisuallyHidden usage as a violation
